name: title-bar
author: lumine-code
description: Theme-aware custom title bar with integrated menu.

controlTheme.title: Window Controls Theme
controlTheme.description: Visual style used for the window control buttons.

customContextMenus.title: Custom Context Menus
customContextMenus.description: Use custom styled HTML context menus instead of native Electron menus. Matches the title bar styling.

autoHide.title: Auto Hide Menu Bar
autoHide.description: Automatically hide the menu bar and toggle it by pressing Alt.

altGivesFocus.title: Alt Gives Focus
altGivesFocus.description: Releasing the alt key gives focus to the application menu.
